texto: That's just the kind of anxiety reality TV hopes to inspire in female viewers. After all, as advertisers have long understood, it's far easier to shill cosmetics and clothing - not to mention Match.com and and Bally Fitness memberships - to insecure women scared of being alone than to it is to self confident people who believe they're beautiful, lovable, and capable of being happy just as they are.
explicacao: Citação de Jennifer L. Pozner sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “That's just the kind of anxiety reality TV hopes to inspire in female viewers. After all, as adve…” articula motivacao, marketing, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e academia.
